criteria.name: feedback timing has no leakage violations
internal candidate learned primitive module tables
internal candidate selected routed/composed features before feedback
internal candidate reaches composition first-heldout threshold
internal candidate reaches composition heldout threshold
internal candidate reaches routing first-heldout threshold
internal candidate reaches routing heldout threshold
internal candidate route selection is correct
internal candidate improves over raw CRA
internal shams are worse than candidate
internal candidate does not underperform selected standard baselines
internal candidate has a meaningful edge over selected standard baselines somewhere

summary.claim_boundary: Software promotion gate only: internal host-side composition/routing mechanism, not hardware/on-chip routing, language, planning, or AGI evidence.

tier: Tier 5.13c - Internal Composition / Routing Promotion Gate
